name: Corn Flake Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well until combined.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (grated peanuts, almond extract, and cornflakes) to the mixture.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a lined cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F until golden brown.
Note: The original recipe text has been rewritten to improve clarity and consistency while maintaining the exact same title as provided. Ingredients have been formatted with units, and instructions are now clear numbered steps. No additional ingredients or steps were added or removed from the original recipe.
